raw_response: Considering the detailed evidence provided—namely, the reduced mineral content of cementum and the protective effect of attachment fibers—it stands clear that cementum does indeed resist resorption more effectively than bone. Thus, agreeing with my earlier assertion, option B "More readily" should actually be corrected based on recent insights to reflect "Less readily."
